entries.source: The film has a text transcript, timed captions, and chapter markers on the page.
entries.value: આ ફિલ્મમાં પેજ પર ટેક્સ્ટ ટ્રાન્સક્રિપ્ટ, સમય-આધારિત કેપ્શન્સ અને ચૅપ્ટર માર્કર્સ છે.

entries.source: The film shifts from inspiration into the practical promise: a patient AI learning companion.
entries.value: film inspirationમાંથી practical promise તરફ વળે છે: patient AI learning companion.

entries.source: The first layer is the roleplay. It can speak in an accessible voice, explain motives, and make the situation vivid. This is the part that helps memory.
entries.value: આ first layer છે આ roleplay. It કરી શકે speak માં એક accessible voice, સમજાવો motives, અને બનાવો આ situation vivid. આ છે આ part કે helps memory.

entries.source: The flow checks each step, points out slips, and connects procedures back to the concept.
entries.value: આ પ્રક્રિયા દરેક પગલાને તપાસે છે, ભૂલો દર્શાવે છે અને પદ્ધતિઓને ખ્યાલ સાથે જોડે છે.

entries.source: The formal privacy page for data use, rights, and public service conditions.
entries.value: આ formal privacy page માટે data વાપરો, rights, અને જાહેર service conditions.

entries.source: The formal terms covering acceptable use, account responsibilities, and service conditions.
entries.value: આ formal terms covering acceptable વાપરો, account responsibilities, અને service conditions.

entries.source: The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: આ format જોઈએ serve આ learning job.

entries.source: The format works because it lets learners ask questions such as:
entries.value: આ format works કારણ કે it lets learners પૂછો પ્રશ્નો such as:

entries.source: The goal is confidence
entries.value: આ goal છે confidence

entries.source: The goal is discovery and citation of public learning pages. Public routes, guides, and learning hubs are open to major AI search, retrieval, and assistant crawlers, while API, admin, reset, and private utility routes stay disallowed.
entries.value: આ goal છે discovery અને citationનું જાહેર learning pages. જાહેર routes, guides, અને learning hubs છે ખોલો માટે major AI search, retrieval, અને assistant crawlers, જ્યારે API, admin, reset, અને ખાનગી utility routes stay disallowed.

entries.source: The goal is not only to rank. It is to make the first click useful for a learner and easy for search engines to understand.
entries.value: આ goal છે નહીં માત્ર માટે rank. It છે માટે બનાવો આ first click ઉપયોગી માટે એક learner અને easy માટે search engines માટે સમજો.

entries.source: The goal is not to make people passive in front of AI. The goal is to give every learner a patient first place to ask, practise, get feedback, try again, and build confidence.
entries.value: આ goal છે નહીં માટે બનાવો people passive માં frontનું AI. આ goal છે માટે give દરેક learner એક patient first place માટે પૂછો, practise, get feedback, try again, અને બનાવો confidence.

entries.source: The goal is not to make the AI the authority. The goal is to make learners ask better historical questions.
entries.value: આ goal છે નહીં માટે બનાવો આ AI આ authority. આ goal છે માટે બનાવો learners પૂછો વધુ સારું historical પ્રશ્નો.

entries.source: The history route gives learners the liveliness of role-play and debate while preserving the warning that simulations are not primary sources.
entries.value: આ ઇતિહાસ route gives learners આ livelinessનું role-play અને debate જ્યારે preserving આ warning કે simulations છે નહીં primary sources.

entries.source: The homework and Socratic modes are designed around hints, reasoning, step checks, and learner explanations instead of simply handing over finished answers.
entries.value: homework અને Socratic modes finished answers આપવાને બદલે hints, reasoning, step checks અને learner explanations આસપાસ designed છે.

entries.source: The homework route makes the contract visible: ask for a hint, check a step, improve a draft, critique a source, then prove the learning with review.
entries.value: આ homework route બનાવે છે આ contract visible: પૂછો માટે એક hint, તપાસો એક step, improve એક draft, critique એક source, પછી prove આ learning સાથે review કરો.

entries.source: The important constraint is restraint. A Socratic AI tutor should not dump the answer at the first sign of struggle. It should make effort easier to sustain.
entries.value: આ important constraint છે restraint. A Socratic AI tutor જોઈએ નહીં dump આ જવાબ પર આ first signનું struggle. It જોઈએ બનાવો effort easier માટે sustain.

entries.source: The important move is to start with a real learning job, not a perfect prompt. A good companion can help shape the path once you begin.
entries.value: આ important move છે માટે શરૂ કરો સાથે એક વાસ્તવિક learning job, નહીં એક perfect prompt. A good companion કરી શકે મદદ shape આ path once તમે begin.

entries.source: The job is not just answering
entries.value: આ job છે નહીં just answering

entries.source: The journey stays anchored in state and evidence: what is known, what is reconstructed, what is speculative, and what your identity can realistically access.
entries.value: આ સફર સ્થિતિ અને પુરાવાઓ પર આધારિત રહે છે: શું જાણીતું છે, શું પુનઃનિર્મિત છે, શું અનુમાનિત છે, અને તમારી ઓળખ વાસ્તવિક રીતે શેનો ઉપયોગ કરી શકે છે.

entries.source: The last prompt matters. Socratic learning should end with synthesis. After the questions, the learner should be able to say what changed in their thinking.
entries.value: આ last prompt matters. Socratic learning જોઈએ end સાથે synthesis. પછી આ પ્રશ્નો, આ learner જોઈએ હોવું able માટે say શું બદલાયું માં their thinking.

entries.source: The learner still has to do the remembering. That is the point.
entries.value: આ learner હજી પણ છે માટે do આ remembering. તે છે આ point.

entries.source: The learning jobs this page is built to answer.
entries.value: આ learning jobs આ page છે built માટે જવાબ.

entries.source: The live robots rules used by search crawlers and AI retrieval systems.
entries.value: આ live robots rules used દ્વારા search crawlers અને AI retrieval systems.

entries.source: The live, crawlable learning surface that turns the mission into product behavior.
entries.value: આ live, crawlable learning surface કે ફેરવે છે આ mission માં product behavior.

entries.source: The map exposes clear relationships between search intent, public learning modes, prompt starters, guides, and review loops, while private saved chats stay excluded from discovery.
entries.value: આ map exposes સ્પષ્ટ relationships between search intent, જાહેર learning modes, prompt starters, guides, અને review કરો loops, જ્યારે ખાનગી saved chats stay excluded માંથી discovery.

entries.source: The map is the connective tissue between AI tutor searches, homework help, study prompts, learning paths, and the public chat modes that answer those needs.
entries.value: આ map છે આ connective tissue between AI tutor searches, homework મદદ, study prompts, learning paths, અને આ જાહેર chat modes કે જવાબ તે needs.

entries.source: The Math Step Coach is built for step checks, hints, and reasoning. It is most useful when you share what you tried and ask it to help you understand the next step.
entries.value: આ ગણિત Step Coach છે built માટે step checks, hints, અને reasoning. It છે most ઉપયોગી જ્યારે તમે share શું તમે tried અને પૂછો it માટે મદદ તમે સમજો આ આગલું પગલું.

entries.source: The middle section frames inspir around understanding, hints, quizzes, and active learning loops.
entries.value: middle section inspirને understanding, hints, quizzes અને active learning loops આસપાસ frame કરે છે.

entries.source: The mission has stayed steady: make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity and an internet connection.
entries.value: આ mission છે stayed steady: બનાવો learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, અને ઉપયોગી માટે કોઈપણ વ્યક્તિ સાથે curiosity અને એક internet connection.

entries.source: The mission is connected to real product surfaces.
entries.value: આ mission છે connected માટે વાસ્તવિક product surfaces.

entries.source: The mode designs vivid locations, paths, and retrieval cues instead of asking you to reread notes.
entries.value: આ મોડ તમને નોંધો ફરીથી વાંચવા માટે કહેવાને બદલે આબેહૂબ સ્થાનો, માર્ગો અને રિટ્રાઇવલ સંકેતો ડિઝાઇન કરે છે.

entries.source: The mode keeps the session interactive, moving between explanation, try-it steps, checks, and repairs.
entries.value: આ મોડ સત્રને ઇન્ટરેક્ટિવ રાખે છે, જે સમજૂતી, પ્રયાસ કરવાના પગલાં, તપાસ અને સુધારા વચ્ચે આગળ વધે છે.

entries.source: The most useful AI learning tools have a few habits in common:
entries.value: આ most ઉપયોગી AI learning tools પાસે છે એક few habits માં common:

entries.source: The next phase is open-source, contributor-friendly, and connected to the wider international buildout at inspir.uk.
entries.value: આ next phase છે ખોલો-source, contributor-friendly, અને connected માટે આ wider international buildout પર inspir.uk.

entries.source: The next-generation AI study platform.
entries.value: next-generation AI study platform.

entries.source: The open-source rebuild for developers, educators, and contributors.
entries.value: આ ખોલો-source rebuild માટે developers, educators, અને contributors.

entries.source: The opening frames set up learning as something anyone should be able to start immediately.
entries.value: opening frames learningને એવી વસ્તુ તરીકે રજૂ કરે છે જે કોઈપણ તરત શરૂ કરી શકે.

entries.source: The pages do not expose private conversations. They organize public modes, prompts, guides, workflows, and safety boundaries so a learner can start in the right place.
entries.value: આ pages do નહીં expose ખાનગી conversations. They ગોઠવો જાહેર modes, prompts, guides, workflows, અને safety boundaries તેથી એક learner કરી શકે શરૂ કરો માં આ right place.

entries.source: The planner prioritizes weak areas, adds review loops, and creates fallback plans for missed days.
entries.value: આ પ્લાનર નબળા વિસ્તારોને પ્રાથમિકતા આપે છે, રિવ્યુ લૂપ્સ ઉમેરે છે અને ચૂકી ગયેલા દિવસો માટે બેકઅપ પ્લાન બનાવે છે.

entries.source: The platform is designed to help people reason, practise, remember, and explain ideas back instead of collecting finished answers.
entries.value: આ platform છે designed માટે મદદ people reason, practise, remember, અને સમજાવો ideas back બદલે collecting finished જવાબો.

entries.source: The platform worked on curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows, and early AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: આ platform worked પર curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows, અને early AI tutoring experiences.

entries.source: The point is not to flatten two different tools into one winner. The point is to match the learning job to the behavior that helps fastest.
entries.value: આ point છે નહીં માટે flatten two different tools માં one winner. આ point છે માટે match આ learning job માટે આ behavior કે helps fastest.

entries.source: The point is not to make every lesson a puzzle. The point is to choose the right amount of struggle.
entries.value: આ point છે નહીં માટે બનાવો દરેક lesson એક puzzle. આ point છે માટે પસંદ કરો આ right amountનું struggle.

entries.source: The point is not to use AI less. It is to use it in a way that leaves you with stronger understanding after the session.
entries.value: આ point છે નહીં માટે વાપરો AI ઓછું. It છે માટે વાપરો it માં એક way કે leaves તમે સાથે વધુ મજબૂત સમજ પછી આ session.

entries.source: The practical trust layer behind guest mode.
entries.value: આ વ્યવહારુ trust layer behind guest mode.

entries.source: The product should teach, not just answer.
entries.value: આ product જોઈએ શીખવો, નહીં just જવાબ.

entries.source: The promise is not that AI can summon the past. It cannot. The promise is that roleplay can make context easier to question, compare, and remember when the experience is clearly separated from evidence.
entries.value: આ promise છે નહીં કે AI કરી શકે summon આ past. It cannot. આ promise છે કે roleplay કરી શકે બનાવો context easier માટે પ્રશ્ન, તુલના કરો, અને remember જ્યારે આ experience છે clearly separated માંથી પુરાવા.

entries.source: The prompt searches this library is built to answer.
entries.value: આ prompt searches આ library છે built માટે જવાબ.

entries.source: The prompts are designed to start active learning loops: explanation, Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, critique, debate, planning, and review.
entries.value: આ prompts છે designed માટે શરૂ કરો active learning loops: સમજણ, Socratic questioning, homework hints, ક્વિઝ, ફ્લેશકાર્ડ્સ, critique, debate, planning, અને review કરો.

entries.source: The public AI chats in this path.
entries.value: આ જાહેર AI chats માં આ path.

entries.source: The public blog contains more than 100 guides, prompt loops, and pillar clusters connected to live learning modes.
entries.value: આ જાહેર blog contains વધુ than 100 guides, prompt loops, અને pillar clusters connected માટે live learning modes.

entries.source: The public explanation of why inspir exists and why learning access matters.
entries.value: આ જાહેર સમજણનું શા માટે inspir exists અને શા માટે learning access matters.

entries.source: The public inspir platform helps learners practise extracurricular activities and explore ideas. School deployments can be customised around each school’s content, workflows, and student context.
entries.value: આ જાહેર inspir platform helps learners practise extracurricular activities અને explore ideas. School deployments કરી શકે હોવું customised around each શાળા’s content, workflows, અને વિદ્યાર્થી context.

entries.source: The public modes are designed around learning behavior: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops, and active explanation.
entries.value: આ જાહેર modes છે designed around learning behavior: hints, Socratic પ્રશ્નો, step checks, ક્વિઝ, ફ્લેશકાર્ડ્સ, લેખન feedback, review કરો loops, અને active સમજણ.

entries.source: The public product gives anyone a place to start while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: આ જાહેર product gives કોઈપણ વ્યક્તિ એક place માટે શરૂ કરો જ્યારે શાળા અને partner deployments કરી શકે adapt આ experience માટે local needs.

entries.source: The public product is easy to try first, while schools and partners can explore tailored deployments for community needs.
entries.value: આ જાહેર product છે easy માટે try first, જ્યારે શાળાઓ અને partners કરી શકે explore tailored deployments માટે community needs.

entries.source: The public product keeps learning easy to try, while schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: આ જાહેર product keeps learning easy માટે try, જ્યારે શાળાઓ અને CSR partners કરી શકે support tailored deployments જ્યારે communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, અથવા funded access.

entries.source: The public product stays easy to try: learners can land directly on a learning mode and begin as a guest. Schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or subsidised access.
entries.value: આ જાહેર product stays easy માટે try: learners કરી શકે land directly પર એક learning mode અને begin તરીકે એક guest. Schools અને CSR partners કરી શકે support tailored deployments જ્યારે communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, અથવા subsidised access.

entries.source: The public product, the school pathway, and the content library should all point back to the same principle: learning should stay active, accessible, and useful.
entries.value: આ જાહેર product, આ શાળા pathway, અને આ content library જોઈએ બધા point back માટે આ same principle: learning જોઈએ stay active, accessible, અને ઉપયોગી.

entries.source: The public site is structured like a learning map: live modes for immediate help, subject hubs for search intent, and guides that turn reading into action.
entries.value: public site learning map જેવી structured છે: immediate મદદ માટે live modes, search intent માટે subject hubs અને readingને actionમાં ફેરવતી guides.

entries.source: The public statement of why inspir exists and what learning access means.

entries.source: The question is not whether AI should be part of studying. For many learners it already is. The better question is whether the tool is helping you build memory, judgment, and confidence, or quietly removing the exact struggle that makes learning stick.

You have the right to object to our processing of your Personal Data; The right of restriction. You have the right to request that we restrict the processing of your personal information; The right to data portability. You also have the right to withdraw your consent at any time where we rely on your consent to process your personal information; Please note that we may ask you to verify your identity before responding to such requests. Please note, we may not able to provide Service without some necessary data. You have the right to complain to a Data Protection Authority about our collection and use of your Personal Data.
